_comment: Zone-inpaint face swap — the founder lane: GPU executes ONLY inside the approved edit zone. 'target' is the picture, 'maskimg' is the zone image (WHITE = change here, black = keep target-authentic: hair, blindfold, ear ink, collar). Identity comes from the trained LoRA (byrdimage splices it) + the character prompt, NOT from warping a photo — this is the route Codex's byrdfacezone.py masks feed. denoise is the control: too low suppresses the LoRA, ~0.9 takes over with artifacts; byrdimage clamps to the usable corridor (default 0.7).
